zh.lifeSummary: 當Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen於1075年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特可時，他的父親Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk35歲，母親Ida de Boulogne31歲。他於大約1097年與Alveradis von Hochstaden在德國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1108年8月9日在他的家鄉享年33歲，埋葬在荷蘭布拉班特可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen于1075年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特可时，他的父亲Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk35岁，母亲Ida de Boulogne31岁。他于大约1097年与Alveradis von Hochstaden在德国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1108年8月9日在他的家乡享年33岁，埋葬在荷兰布拉班特可。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Malsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Yorkshire): metronymic meaning ‘Matilda's son’, from the Middle English female personal name Mall (a common pet form of Maud or Matilda) + -son. See also Maul , Maule , and Maull .

variants.name: Mall
meanings: English: from the medieval female personal name Mall, a common form of Mald or Maud. See also Maude and Moll . It had several pet forms; see Malin , Malkin , and Mallet .

variants.name: Malsam
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Malson  . Compare   Malsom  .

nameMeanings.name: Hendrik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen was born in 1075, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk, was 35 and his mother, Ida de Boulogne, was 31. He married Alveradis von Hochstaden about 1097, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 August 1108, in his hometown, at the age of 33, and was buried in Cuijk, Brabant, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen est né en 1075, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ida de Boulogne, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alveradis von Hochstaden environ 1097, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 août 1108, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Cuijk, Brabant, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen 1075 in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk 35 und seine Mutter Ida de Boulogne 31. Er hat um 1097 in Deutschland Alveradis von Hochstaden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. August 1108 im Alter von 33 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cuijk, Brabant, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen è nato il nel 1075 nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Ida de Boulogne, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alveradis von Hochstaden circa 1097, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 agosto 1108, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Cuijk, Brabant, Paesi Bassi.

ja.Cuijk, Brabant, Nederland: オランダブラバントクウイジク
ja.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジク
ja.Cuijck, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジク
ja.lifeSummary: Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsenが1075年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクで生まれた時，父Hermann van Malsen-Cuijkは35歳，母Ida de Boulogneは31歳であった。約1097年にドイツでAlveradis von Hochstadenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1108年8月9日に故郷で33歳で死去し，オランダブラバントクウイジクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen(이)가 1075년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 c이j크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Ida de Boulogne(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1097년 독일에서 Alveradis von Hochstaden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1108년 8월 9일 그의 고향에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 브라반트 c이j크에 묻혔다.

pt.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Cuijck, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen nasceu em 1075, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Ida de Boulogne, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alveradis von Hochstaden aproximadamente 1097, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1108, em sua cidade natal, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Cuijk, Brabant, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen родился в 1075 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ida de Boulogne, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alveradis von Hochstaden около 1097 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 августа 1108 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности куиджк, брабант, Нидерланды.

es.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.Cuijck, Noord-Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen nació en 1075, en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Hermann van Malsen-Cuijk, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Ida de Boulogne, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alveradis von Hochstaden aproximadamente 1097, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1108, en su pueblo, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Cuijk, Brabant, Países Bajos.
